title: Avoid Redundant Extensions and Implementations
description: Explicitly extending Object and implementing interfaces and their parents can be redundant.
recommendation: Avoid explicit extensions of Object and multiple implementations of interfaces.
impact: Redundant code can lead to increased complexity and potential maintenance issues.

noncompliant: public class Foo extends Object implements MyFace, MyOtherFace { ... }

checks.message: Avoid explicit extensions of Object and multiple implementations of interfaces.
